briefdescription.para: The broadcast source has been created for handover.

detaileddescription.para: When this is called, the broadcast source has been created and the BASE can be generated by bt_cap_initiator_broadcast_get_base(). To continue with the broadcast reception part of the procedure, the application shall enable extended and periodic advertising and set the BASE in the periodic advertising data with bt_le_per_adv_set_data(). The procedure will finish once the CAP acceptors have synced to the newly created broadcast source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to newly created broadcast source.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_cap_handover_cb::unicast_to_broadcast_complete) (int err, struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_cap_unicast_group *unicast_group, struct bt_cap_broadcast_source *broadcast_source)
memberdef.argsstring: )(int err, struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_cap_unicast_group *unicast_group, struct bt_cap_broadcast_source *broadcast_source)
memberdef.name: unicast_to_broadcast_complete

briefdescription.para: The unicast to broadcast handover procedure has finished.

parameterdescription.para: 0 if success else a negative errno value.
Pointer to the connection where the error occurred or NULL if local failure.
NULL if the unicast group was deleted during the procedure, else pointer to the unicast group provided in the parameters.
Pointer to newly created broadcast source, or NULL in case of an error happening before it was created.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_cap_handover_cb::broadcast_to_unicast_complete) (int err, struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_cap_broadcast_source *broadcast_source, struct bt_cap_unicast_group *unicast_group)
memberdef.argsstring: )(int err, struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_cap_broadcast_source *broadcast_source, struct bt_cap_unicast_group *unicast_group)
memberdef.name: broadcast_to_unicast_complete

briefdescription.para: The broadcast to unicast handover procedure has finished.

parameterdescription.para: 0 if success else a negative errno value.
Pointer to the connection where the error occurred or NULL if local failure.
NULL if the broadcast sourced was deleted during the procedure, else pointer to the broadcast sourced provided in the parameters.
Pointer to newly created unicast group, or NULL in case of an error happening before it was created.
